sector_summary: The sectors with medium confidence include Financials, Consumer Staples, Healthcare, and Technology, all showing varying degrees of performance against the S&P 500. Consumer Discretionary, Clean Energy, and Biotech sectors exhibit conflicts between price momentum and news flow, indicating uncertainty in their outlooks.
